proposal_text.title: # DUNA Admin Election Structure
proposal_text.description:
# DUNA Admin Election Structure

**TL;DR** This proposal establishes a transparent, community-driven election process for selecting 2 DUNA Admins through token-weighted approval voting on Nouns.gg, achieved with Arweave, followed by on-chain finalization.

![](https://i.ibb.co/35bjCvdk/Screenshot-2025-12-27-at-7-14-20-PM.png)

**Background Information:** The previous DUNA Admin selection lacked a formal election process. Index and Prof were initially chosen by the Nounders and a working group, with Satori selected as a replacement after Prof could not commit. This proposal ensures a fair, open election where all Nouners can meaningfully participate.

***Proposed Election Structure (Suggested by 5gram)***    **Voting Method: Token-Weighted Approval Voting**

- Each voter may approve up to 2 candidates  
- Voters can split their voting weight between their selected candidates  
- The top 2 candidates by total approved voting weight are the winners. 
  1. First place becomes the DUNA Admin  
  2. Second place becomes the DUNA Admin Reserve  

***Timeline (4+ weeks total)***    

**Warming-Up Period (2 weeks)**

- Candidates submit applications  
- Publication of candidate statements and proposed budgets  
- Community discussion during weekly spaces (minimum 2 sessions)  
- Candidates share their pitches and qualifications 

**Voting Period (1 week)**

- Off-chain voting conducted on Nouns.gg  
- All Nouners have sufficient time to review candidates and cast votes 

**On-Chain Finalization (8 days)**

- Single proposal submitted naming the elected Admins  
- Proposal includes terms (tenure, reporting requirements, recusal rules)  
- Proposal includes budget caps and payment stream details  
- Standard DAO vote to ratify the election results 

***Rationale***

**This structure provides:**

- Transparency: Open submission and voting process visible to all  
- Adequate Time: 3+ weeks ensures broad participation and informed decision-making  
- Community Voice: Token-weighted approval voting empowers all Nouners  
- Efficiency: Single on-chain proposal reduces governance overhead  
- Smooth Transition: Timeline aligns with current Admin term expiration 
- Preserves History by archiving submissions with Arweave 

**Voting - Please Note:**  

- A "**For**" vote approves this election structure and authorizes conducting the preliminary voting round on Nouns.gg.  
- A "**Against**" vote rejects this proposed election process.
